criticalBoundary.assessment: Substantially improved: center jump is reduced by about 44%, and excess area change is reduced by about 91%. The remaining pixel-diff warning is the expected head-orientation transition and has no visible body-scale pop.

semanticImprovement: All sixteen directions now form a consistent clockwise family with unmistakable 000 up, 090 right, 180 down, and 270 left cardinals; row 10 retains screen-left landmarks throughout 202.5-337.5.
overallVerdict: candidate is materially smoother and more precise than baseline without changing rows 0-8 identity or motion
